zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，短期关注区间波动]
zh.content:
当前以太坊/美元（ETH/USD）价格处于2291.89美元，全天波动幅度较小，变化仅为0.08%。从短期走势来看，ETH/USD呈现震荡整理的格局，价格在2294.46和2289.8美元之间波动，未显示明显的上行或下行趋势。若继续维持该区间波动，市场情绪或将保持谨慎。

技术指标方面，MACD显示为负值-2.66173，但未有明显的信号线数据提供进一步的趋势确认。RSI指标当前缺失，但通常情况下，RSI若回落至30以下，可能表明超卖状态，若突破70，则可能进入超买区域。SMA(20)为2285.92，提供了一定的短期支撑。

支撑位位于2289.8美元附近，若价格下跌并突破此水平，可能会进一步回落至2280美元一线。而2294.46美元则是关键的阻力位，若突破此价格区间，可能会打开上行空间，接近2300美元。

综合来看，当前市场处于震荡状态，建议短期内投资者可以关注2294.46美元的上行突破或2289.8美元的下行突破。若突破区间，考虑顺势操作，但需设定止损，避免突发波动造成损失。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently consolidating around the $2291.89 mark, showing minimal movement over the past 24 hours with a 0.08% change. The narrow trading range between $2289.8 and $2294.46 indicates a period of indecision, suggesting the market is pausing after the recent momentum. Short-term price action seems balanced, with the SMA(20) at $2285.92 acting as a mild support level. This near-term consolidation could set the stage for a breakout in either direction depending on market sentiment and volume.  

The MACD is slightly negative at -2.66173, signaling mild bearish pressure, although the absence of a signal line makes it difficult to confirm a strong trend. The lack of RSI data prevents a clear picture of overbought or oversold conditions, but the minimal price change implies neither extreme is currently present. Traders should remain cautious, watching for any divergence between MACD movement and price to anticipate potential shifts in momentum.  

Key support is around $2285, coinciding with the SMA(20), while resistance sits near $2295, marking the recent daily high. A breakout above $2295 could open the way to higher targets around $2310–$2320, while a drop below $2285 could test the $2275 zone. Price action within this narrow band suggests that scalping strategies or range-bound trades may be effective in the short term, while larger position trades may be better suited once a clear directional breakout occurs.  

For trading strategies, cautious buyers might consider entering on dips toward the SMA(20) support, with tight stop-losses slightly below $2285 to manage downside risk. Aggressive traders may wait for a confirmed breakout above $2295 with strong volume to capture upward momentum. Conversely, bearish traders could look for short opportunities if the price breaks below SMA support decisively, targeting $2275 as a potential profit zone. Overall, patience and confirmation signals will be critical in this low-volatility environment.
